name: ServiceSource International, Inc.
description: ServiceSource International, Inc. is a provider of business process-as-a-service (BPaaS) solutions that enable the transformation of go-to-market organizations and functions for global technology clients. The company offers a comprehensive suite of outsourced solutions designed to help global brands effectively manage their customer relationships, personalize customer interactions, and drive recurring revenue growth. By leveraging extensive expertise, data-driven insights, and digitally-enabled solutions, ServiceSource supports high-tech companies, cloud-based solution providers, and software-as-a-service (SaaS) firms in optimizing their customer lifecycle management and operational performance across global markets.
